journal_entry.description: Acquisition of 10% equity interest in Ford under equity method
journal_entry.rationale: Under IAS 28, investment in associate is initially measured at cost, which includes the purchase price plus directly attributable transaction costs. The $3,000,000 purchase price and $100,000 transaction fee are capitalized as part of the investment cost. Cash decreases by the total amount paid.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Equity method investment acquisition: the investment asset increases by purchase price plus directly attributable transaction costs ($3,000,000 + $100,000 = $3,100,000), cash decreases by the same amount. Under IAS 28, transaction costs are capitalized as part of the initial cost of the investment in associate.
